response: Oppenheimer, a Drama/History film directed by Christopher Nolan, was released in 2023 with a runtime of 180 minutes and a production budget of $100 million. The film was a massive commercial and critical success, grossing $952 million at the box office while earning an impressive IMDB score of 8.3 and a 93% rating on Rotten Tomatoes. The acclaimed blockbuster ultimately received the highest honor in cinema, winning the Academy Award for Best Picture.
